Purpose: Trends over time for continuous data
Use Case: Growth analytics / stock prices / temperature

Purpose: Comparisons between discrete categories
Use Case: Revenue by region / product sales comparison

Purpose: Part-to-whole relationships with readable center space
Use Case: Budget allocation / market share / survey results

Purpose: Correlations and outliers between two variables
Use Case: Ad spend vs revenue / scientific experiments

Purpose: Density or frequency across two categorical axes
Use Case: User activity by hour & day / geographic intensity

Purpose: Cumulative totals or stacked volumes over time
Use Case: Network traffic / energy consumption trends

Purpose: Multivariate comparison across a common center
Use Case: Player skill stats / product feature benchmarking

Purpose: Hierarchical data proportionality as nested rectangles
Use Case: Portfolio breakdown / file system usage / budget categories

Purpose: Flow and movement between states with proportional width
Use Case: Supply chain flows, user funnels, energy transfer

Purpose: Timeline tasks and milestones across a horizontal axis
Use Case: Project management / sprint planning / production schedule

Purpose: Visual frequency weighting of terms
Use Case: Sentiment analysis / survey responses / SEO keyword mapping

Purpose: Three dimensions encoded as x-position, y-position, and circle size
Use Case: Demographics / market sizing / risk/impact analysis

Purpose: Cumulative positive and negative effects on a running total
Use Case: Financial P&L statements / variance analysis

Purpose: Inline micro-trend indicator with no axes
Use Case: Stock tickers / KPI dashboards / table row trends

Purpose: Distribution spread showing median quartiles and outliers
Use Case: Statistical quality control / salary band analysis

Purpose: Frequency distribution of continuous data across bins
Use Case: Age distribution / response time analysis / test scores

Purpose: Simple part-to-whole for 5 or fewer categories
Use Case: Survey split / market share (small datasets only)

Purpose: Stage-by-stage volume drop-off in a sequential process
Use Case: Conversion funnel / recruitment pipeline / sales stages

Purpose: Part-to-whole composition across multiple categories over time
Use Case: Revenue breakdown by product line / survey results by segment

Purpose: Side-by-side category comparison across multiple series
Use Case: Monthly sales by region / A/B test results by cohort

Purpose: Single headline metric with trend indicator and target comparison
Use Case: Sales dashboard / OKR tracking / real-time monitoring

Purpose: Progress toward a single target shown on a circular arc
Use Case: NPS score / capacity utilization / performance vs goal

Purpose: Single bar with target line and performance benchmark bands
Use Case: Sales quota attainment / SLA compliance / quality metrics

Purpose: Geographic areas shaded by data value intensity
Use Case: Election results / regional sales / population density

Purpose: Geographic positions with circle size encoding a numeric value
Use Case: City-level revenue / store footprint / event density

Purpose: Bar chart variant with dot-and-stem for cleaner dense comparisons
Use Case: Long ranked lists / performance vs target across many items

Purpose: Two-point line showing change between exactly two time periods
Use Case: Before/after comparison / policy impact / year-over-year shift

Purpose: Stacked area with organic flowing shape for temporal composition
Use Case: Music listening trends / social media topic flow over time

Purpose: Hierarchical data as concentric rings radiating from center
Use Case: Org chart / folder structure / taxonomic breakdown

Purpose: Circular flow connections between entities with arc thickness
Use Case: Trade flows between countries / cross-team collaboration

Purpose: Nodes and edges showing relationships in a connected system
Use Case: Social network analysis / dependency mapping / org relationships

Purpose: Back-to-back horizontal bars comparing two groups across categories
Use Case: Age/gender demographics / cohort comparison

Purpose: Multi-axis lines showing multivariate data patterns
Use Case: High-dimensional dataset exploration / car spec comparison

Purpose: Kernel density distribution mirrored around a central axis
Use Case: Statistical distribution comparison across groups / A/B testing

Purpose: Smoothed frequency curve of continuous variable distribution
Use Case: Customer age distribution / latency distribution

Purpose: Open-high-low-close price movement over time periods
Use Case: Financial markets / crypto / trading dashboards

Purpose: Line chart with confidence interval bands widening over time
Use Case: Revenue forecasting / population projections / risk modeling

Purpose: Grid of the same chart type repeated per category for comparison
Use Case: Regional sales trends / per-product metrics / cohort behavior

Purpose: Two-dimensional proportional grid encoding two categorical variables
Use Case: Market share by segment and size / survey cross-tabulation

Purpose: Square grid of cells where colored groups show percentages
Use Case: Progress indicators / survey results / part-to-whole for non-technical audiences

Purpose: Icon-per-unit grid encoding quantities as countable symbols
Use Case: Public health data / humanitarian stats / accessible infographics

Purpose: Two endpoints on a horizontal axis showing difference between two values
Use Case: Gender pay gap / before/after treatment effect / policy comparison

Purpose: Events plotted chronologically on a horizontal or vertical axis
Use Case: Product history / project milestones / biography

Purpose: Individual data points along an axis without bar aggregation
Use Case: Survey likert responses / precise value comparison / small datasets

Purpose: Calendar grid with cells colored by daily value intensity
Use Case: GitHub contribution heatmap / daily revenue / habit tracking

Purpose: Bar chart wrapped around a central point in polar coordinates
Use Case: Seasonal data / 24-hour activity / cyclical comparisons

Purpose: Partial circle showing single metric progress toward completion
Use Case: Onboarding completion / storage used / loading state UI

Purpose: Gridded color intensity showing joint distribution of two variables
Use Case: Click maps / bivariate correlation / geospatial clustering
